title: SCP Armour
description: A simple mod adding craftable armour based on SCP
body:
Just a simple mod that adds in 13 craftable armour sets (see the gallery), mainly for use with the SCP lockdown mod.

Some of the armours give effects relating to the armour:

The fire eaters give fire resistance for a full set,

The deep feeders give water breathing and night vision to help traverse underwater

Samsara gives strength and speed with a full set
